title: Fix admin panel stuck in 'checking permissions' loading state

requirements.text: Debug and fix the admin route component in frontend/src/App.tsx to identify why the permissions check is stuck in a loading state and never resolves to display the AdminPanel component or access denied message

quotes: It is just saying checking promissions

acceptanceCriteria: The admin route no longer displays 'checking permissions' indefinitely
The permissions check completes and renders either the AdminPanel or an access denied message
Console logging shows the exact state and flow of the permissions check

requirements.text: Add comprehensive error handling and timeout logic to the admin route permissions check in frontend/src/App.tsx to prevent infinite loading states when the backend isCallerAdmin call hangs or fails silently

quotes: It is just saying checking promissions

acceptanceCriteria: If the permissions check takes longer than 10 seconds, display a timeout error message
If the backend call fails, display a clear error message instead of hanging
The loading state has a maximum duration after which it transitions to an error state

requirements.text: Verify the useIsOwner hook in frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts correctly handles the React Query loading states and errors, ensuring it does not return an undefined or permanently loading state that causes the admin route to hang

quotes: It is just saying checking promissions

acceptanceCriteria: The useIsOwner hook returns a definitive isLoading boolean that transitions to false
The hook handles errors and returns an error state instead of hanging
Console logging shows the exact React Query state transitions

requirements.text: Add frontend console logging in the admin route component to output the complete state of the permissions check including: isLoading value, isError value, isOwner value, error object if present, and the exact render decision being made

quotes: It is just saying checking promissions

acceptanceCriteria: Console logs show the permissions check state on every render
Logs clearly indicate why the 'checking permissions' message persists
Logs show when and how the loading state should transition to a resolved state

constraints: Do not modify the backend isCallerAdmin method or actor initialization logic
Do not change the useActor hook or Internet Identity authentication flow
Focus only on the frontend permissions check rendering logic and state management
